params.name: Dongba Scripture
params.description: Dongba Scripture is a classic literature of the Naxi ethnic group. The Dongba culture of the Naxi people is renowned for its unique pictographic characters and rich cultural heritage. Dongba Scripture is considered one of the oldest pictographic writing systems, and the Dongba Scripture written in Dongba script contain information about the origin of the universe, human history, religious rituals, medical knowledge, astronomy and calendar, moral norms, and poetry stories.
